CustomField.formula: IF(AND(FL_Partner__c = TRUE,FL_Partner_Soon__c = FALSE,FL_Parnter_Lapsed__c = FALSE), 'Active Partner',IF( AND(FL_Partner__c = TRUE,FL_Partner_Soon__c = TRUE,FL_Parnter_Lapsed__c = FALSE), 'Partner is Soon to Lapse',IF( AND(FL_Partner__c = TRUE,FL_Partner_Soon__c = TRUE,FL_Parnter_Lapsed__c = TRUE),'Partner Lapsed','None')))
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Partner Status based on Giving History
CustomField.label: Partner Status
